items.author: RealGM
items.body_excerpt: Jevon Carter, Magic Agree To One-Year, $3.5M Deal https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/286465/Jevon-Carter-Magic-Agree-To-One-Year-$35M-Deal

items.title: Jevon Carter is getting a one-year deal for the veteran minimum. He'll hit the cap at roughly $2.4M. Same cap hit as Nikola Vucevic.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Jevon Carter is getting a one-year deal for the veteran minimum. He'll hit the cap at roughly $2.4M. Same cap hit as Nikola Vucevic.

I've got the Magic about $6.2M under the second apron with two open roster spots. Could squeeze in a Taxpayer MLE signing, but likely won't to avoid a 2A hard cap.

items.title: Free agent guard Jevon Carter has agreed to a one-year, $3.5 million deal to stay with the Orlando Magic, sources tell ESPN. Carter finished the season in Orlando and earned a rotation role.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent guard Jevon Carter has agreed to a one-year, $3.5 million deal to stay with the Orlando Magic, sources tell ESPN. Carter finished the season in Orlando and earned a rotation role.
